ads.author: Carlos Daniel Rando
ads.title: Pinball machine Lethal Weapon 3
ads.description: Lethal Weapon 3 Pinball Machine – Classic (Working) For sale: Lethal Weapon 3 pinball machine, manufactured by Data East in 1992. The machine is working and fully playable. Display, sound, lights, and mechanisms are working All main game functions operational Ready to play The machine has some cosmetic wear consistent with its age, which is normal for a machine that is over 30 years old. To bring it closer to like-new condition, it would benefit from basic maintenance, mainly replacing the rubber rings where the ball rebounds, which is common upkeep for vintage pinball machines. Overall, the game plays well and works as it should. Perfect for: Collectors, Game rooms, Bars or restaurants, Home arcade / mancave The machine can be seen and tested before purchase. Pinball Lethal Weapon 3 – Máquina Clásica de Pinball (Funcionando) Se vende máquina de pinball Lethal Weapon 3, fabricada por Data East en 1992. La máquina está funcionando y se puede jugar sin problemas. Pantalla, sonido, luces y mecanismos funcionando Todos los sistemas del juego operativos Lista para jugar La máquina tiene algunos detalles normales por el uso y la antigüedad. Para dejarla en condiciones óptimas o como nueva, sería recomendable hacer mantenimiento básico, principalmente cambiar las gomas (rubbers) donde rebota la bola, algo normal en máquinas de esta edad. Es un mantenimiento sencillo y económico para quienes conocen o disfrutan restaurar pinballs. Ideal para: Coleccionistas, Salas de juego Bar o restaurante, Mancave o sala de entretenimiento en casa Se puede ver y probar funcionando antes de la compra.

I put a lot of time in the button layout to match most of the vintage arcade games and they use high quality sanwa joysticks and arcade buttons. the cabinet is on Wheels and it took me days to build that thing. full size I mirrored it exactly off the original Atari cabinet dimensions. must pick up off Clark Road and Sarasota cash only please

It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – P.O.W. Prisoners of War (SNK, 1988) Price: $325 Own a piece of late-80s arcade history! This is an original P.O.W. – Prisoners of War upright cabinet from SNK, released in 1988. Known as a classic scrolling fighter / beat ’em up, players battle their way through enemy compounds after escaping captivity. It’s a gritty, action-packed title that helped define the genre and remains a nostalgic favorite for collectors. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor powers on but the image quality is poor. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — ideal for restoration enthusiasts. Highlights: - Rare SNK beat ’em up from the golden age of arcades. - Upright cabinet with authentic late-80s design. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

Condition: - Cabinet is original and shows its age — it needs some love. - Monitor has been converted to LCD. - Lights power on. - Sound is present. - Game plays and works! It's been 5 years or so but control panel is excellent overlay, the board was shopped out with the old ram removed and replaced with the industry standard as well as newer style arcade power supply to avoid the original mcr problems. Original stick and buttons. Any questions just ask.

ads.author: Erin Svendsen Meyer
ads.title: Police Trainer Classic Arcade Game
ads.description: Classic Police Trainer Arcade Game with police Vector light bar and strobes in great condition. This is an original Police Trainer arcade machine made in 1997. Everything works great including the blue lights which you can turn on and off independently. Police Trainer is a target shooting simulation game that takes 1 or 2 players through a series of levels created to help develop skills such as accuracy, speed, decision making, etc., as you compete for high scores. This game has been a lot of fun for our family and friends. It is all target shooting so there's no blood or actual violence; rated for mature responsible ages and individuals. This arcade machine is big and very heavy. If you need it delivered, text me and we might be able to work it out depending on delivery location. Dimensions: H=80in, D=40in, W=32in Asking $1500 but will entertain REASONABLE offers. If you lowball, I won't respond. If you have something to trade, text me and let me know. eight four three five one four nine nine seven five

All screws and cable ties are still in place. Very clean, all original. No mold, no smell, no cigarette burns. Missing the monitor, marquee, foot rest, and some of the joystick handle pieces. Does have the back door, coin box with lid, owners manual and all service and schematics. Overlay is great, side art is good. Unable to test as the monitor is missing. $700 bucks Thanks Also... located in Chattanooga, available for pickup anytime or can help with shipping.
